creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/freebsd-14-stable-not-found.93985/> reported an absence of 14-STABLE. 

VM-IMAGES
=========

<https://download.freebsd.org/snapshots/VM-IMAGES/14.0-STABLE/> exists, outdated. 

<https://download.freebsd.org/snapshots/VM-IMAGES/14.1-STABLE/> is 404 not found. 

That combination (14.0 present, 14.1 not yet present) seems inconsistent with announcements that included VM-IMAGES on, for example, 7th and 21st June. Respectively: 

<https://mail-archive.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?20240607003756.85CB41E9C2>
<https://mail-archive.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?20240621004200.580F35729>
